description: Modify a single segment by ID.

keywords.name: control-point
keywords.description: Modify control points of the segment. Must be followed by an 'add', 'clear', 'move', or 'remove' sub-keyword. Control points apply to non-line segment types (curve, spline, polyline).

keywords.name: control-point-add
keywords.description: Add a control point at location v3, a 3D coordinate vector (u,v,w). If local is used, the location is in a coordinate system defined by the segment, where x goes from end 1 at 0.0 to end 2 at 1.0 and y is normal to that.

keywords.name: control-point-clear
keywords.description: Remove all control points from the segment.

keywords.name: control-point-move
keywords.description: Move the control point with positional index i to location v3, a 3D coordinate vector (u,v,w). If local is used, the segment local coordinate system is used (see add above).

keywords.name: control-point-remove
keywords.description: Remove one or more control points by positional index.

keywords.name: group
keywords.description: Assign the group name s1 in slot s2 (if supplied) to the segment. The segment is removed from the group/slot if remove is present. If the slot keyword is omitted, the slot is set to the slot named Default.

keywords.name: ratio
keywords.description: Set the ratio f (a number between 0.1 and 10.0), which is used to distribute zone lengths along the segment (each zone will be f of the size of the zone preceding it).

keywords.name: size
keywords.description: Set the number of zones on the segment.

keywords.name: type
keywords.description: Specify the curve type of the segment. Must be followed by a 'curve', 'polyline', 'simple', or 'spline' sub-keyword.

keywords.name: type-curve
keywords.description: Specify a curve segment represented by a B-spline.

keywords.name: type-polyline
keywords.description: Specify a polyline segment (piecewise linear through control points).

keywords.name: type-simple
keywords.description: Specify a simple (straight line) segment. This is the default type.

keywords.name: zone-length
keywords.description: Set the target zone length on the segment (f between 1e-05 and 100000). The number of zones is derived from segment length / zone-length, clamped to the 1-10000 range.
